message:
chore: unexport 4 dead symbols in internal/compact

Unexport package-internal symbols with no external callers:
- CompactableStore interface
- HaikuClient type, newHaikuClient constructor
- ErrAPIKeyRequired sentinel error

Kept BatchResult exported (used by internal/rpc/server_compact.go).
